labels.errorDescription: The complaint detail mock request failed. Replace the service when the live endpoint is ready.
labels.notFoundDescription: The selected complaint does not exist in the current mock dataset.

items.title: Water seepage from corridor ceiling
items.summaryBody: There is visible water seepage and staining on the common corridor ceiling near the lift lobby outside Unit A-12-08. The patch became larger after yesterday's heavy rain and a small amount of dripping was noticed this morning. The floor is still dry at the moment, but the ceiling looks damp and may become a safety issue if left unattended.

timeline.title: Resolved
timeline.description: Issue has been fully repaired and closed.

timeline.title: In Progress
timeline.description: The maintenance technician has been assigned to inspect the ceiling slab and rainwater pipe routing. Assessment is expected before noon.

timeline.title: Submitted
timeline.description: Complaint received by the resident support system and routed to the maintenance desk.

items.conciergeMessage: We have informed the maintenance supervisor and the affected corridor will be monitored while the team checks whether the seepage is caused by the roof slab or an internal pipe. Please keep the area clear for inspection.
items.helpBody: If the leak becomes active or the floor becomes slippery, please contact the guard house immediately so the on-duty team can respond.

items.title: Parking bay lighting outage
Basement car park lighting not working
items.summaryBody: Several light points at Basement 2 were not functioning, causing poor visibility for residents returning at night and affecting access to nearby parking bays.

timeline.title: Complaint submitted
timeline.description: Your case was logged and forwarded to the building electrical team.

timeline.title: Electrical inspection completed
timeline.description: The team identified ballast failures affecting several fixtures.

timeline.title: Case resolved
timeline.description: Repairs were completed and the affected row was restored to full brightness.

items.conciergeMessage: The electrical contractor replaced the faulty ballast and tested the affected fittings before handing the area back to management.
items.helpBody: If lighting fails again in a high-traffic area, please contact the guard house or management office so the on-duty team can respond quickly.
